3140740.name: Sanarah
3140740.description:
Sanarah: Episode One

After two years, sightings have emerged of Leelee, the subject of Sanarah’s missing persons case, number 4242. Reopening the case ignites the chaotic forces from deep beneath the noise and violence of life.

“When the eyes touch your mind, dreams become shapes in the dark, calling you deeper and deeper.” -Author Unknown

FEATURES:

  • Story Rich.

  • Interact with the world to outsmart machine counterparts and spectral aberrations.

  • Both third and first person perspectives (depending on the character played).

  • Hacks and upgrades.

  • Auto Save at key moments.
3140740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
